name_en: Chanel vintage Victoria Beckham Backpack Limited Edition
name_cn:
Chanel vintage Victoria Beckham Backpack Limited Edition
Chanel jumbo Victoria Beckham backpack. The backpack version of the Victoria Beckham bag is very special, plus the large double C logo, it's handsome and eye-catching, very stylish. It's hard to find someone with the same bag. Very vintage. Has a built-in zipper, very practical. A bag suitable for both personal use and collection.
AS1102 Dimensions: 28*8*20cm
